old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-y786","title":"EDHOC: TH_3 computation simplified from RFC 9528 spec","description":"PROTOCOL: TH_3 computation does not match RFC 9528 specification, causing interoperability issues.

Initiator (lines 627-635):
memcpy(th3_input + th3_len, ctx->th_2, 32);
memcpy(th3_input + th3_len, plaintext_2, ct2_len);
memcpy(th3_input + th3_len, peer_pubkey, 32);
sha256_hash(th3_input, th3_len, ctx->th_3);

Responder (lines 970-978): Similar raw concatenation

This computes H(TH_2 || PLAINTEXT_2 || CRED_R) with raw bytes.

Per RFC 9528 Section 4.1.2, TH_3 should be:
TH_3 = H(TH_2, CIPHERTEXT_2, ID_CRED_R)

Issues:
1. Uses PLAINTEXT_2 instead of CIPHERTEXT_2
2. Uses CRED_R instead of ID_CRED_R  
3. No CBOR encoding of components

Comment at line 626 acknowledges: 'ponytail: proper TH_3 needs CBOR encoding'

Impact: Will not interoperate with RFC 9528-compliant implementations.

File: lichen/subsys/lichen/edhoc/edhoc.c:627-635,970-978","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:44:42.916576Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:44:42.916608Z"}
